name: Ragi Dosa
instructions: Mix ragi flour with curd, water, salt; rest 10 min; cook thin on tava with little oil.

name: Plain Dosa
instructions: Spread fermented batter thin on hot tava; cook till golden.

name: Idli (Steamed Pair)
instructions: Steam fermented batter in idli moulds for 10 min.

name: Set Dosa
instructions: Pour thicker batter, cover till cooked; serve as set of 2-3.

name: Akki Roti
instructions: Knead rice flour with grated coconut, onion, coriander; pat onto hot tava.

name: Ragi Mudde
instructions: Stir ragi flour into boiling water, cook covered, shape into balls.

name: Plain Roti
instructions: Knead atta with water, divide, roll thin, roast on tava till puffed.

name: Multigrain Roti
instructions: Knead a mix of wheat + ragi + jowar flours; roll thin; roast on tava.

name: Jowar Roti
instructions: Knead jowar flour with hot water; pat by hand on a damp cloth; roast on tava.

name: Bajra Roti
instructions: Knead bajra flour with warm water; pat thin; roast on tava with ghee.

name: Phulka
instructions: Thin atta roti puffed directly on flame; no oil.

name: Methi Thepla
instructions: Knead atta with methi leaves, curd, spices; roll thin; cook with little oil.

name: Steamed Rice
instructions: Wash rice; cook 1:2 with water in pressure cooker 1 whistle.

name: Brown Rice Steamed
instructions: Soak brown rice 30 min; cook 1:2.5 with water in pressure cooker 3 whistles.

name: Red Rice Steamed
instructions: Soak; cook 1:2.5.

name: Curd Rice
instructions: Mash cooked rice with cold curd, salt; temper mustard-curry leaves.

name: Vegetable Khichdi
instructions: Pressure cook rice + moong dal + chopped veg + ghee + salt + turmeric for 3 whistles.

name: Millet Khichdi
instructions: Replace rice with foxtail or little millet; pressure cook as khichdi.

name: Pongal (Ven)
instructions: Pressure cook rice + moong dal; temper ghee + pepper + cumin + ginger.

name: Vegetable Pulao
instructions: Saute spices + onion + veg; add rice + water 1:2; pressure cook 2 whistles.

name: Lemon Rice
instructions: Toss cooked rice with tempered mustard, curry leaves, peanuts, turmeric, lemon.

name: Coconut Rice
instructions: Mix cooked rice with grated coconut, tempered with mustard, curry leaves, urad.

name: Sambar
instructions: Cook toor dal; add tamarind water, mixed veg, sambar powder; simmer; temper.

name: Rasam
instructions: Boil tamarind water + tomato + rasam powder + pepper-cumin; temper with mustard.

name: Toor Dal Tadka
instructions: Pressure cook toor dal with turmeric; temper ghee + cumin + garlic + chilli.

name: Moong Dal
instructions: Pressure cook moong dal; temper cumin, ghee, asafoetida.

name: Masoor Dal
instructions: Cook masoor dal; temper onion-tomato-cumin.

name: Chana Dal
instructions: Pressure cook soaked chana dal; temper ghee + cumin + ginger.

name: Rajma Curry
instructions: Soak rajma overnight; pressure cook; simmer in onion-tomato gravy.

name: Kabuli Chana Masala
instructions: Pressure cook soaked chana; simmer in onion-tomato masala.

name: Black Chana Sundal
instructions: Boil soaked chana with salt; toss with tempered mustard, curry leaves, coconut.

name: Sprouts Salad
instructions: Toss moong sprouts + chopped tomato, cucumber, onion, lemon, chaat masala.

name: Moong Chilla
instructions: Grind soaked moong + ginger + chilli + salt; pour pancake-style on hot tava.

name: Besan Chilla
instructions: Mix besan with water + spices + chopped onion-tomato; cook pancake-style.

name: Vegetable Upma
instructions: Roast suji; saute mustard + onion + veg; add water + suji; cook till fluffy.

name: Vegetable Poha
instructions: Rinse poha; saute mustard + onion + potato + peas + turmeric; mix poha; lemon.

name: Oats Porridge (Savoury)
instructions: Saute mustard + curry leaves + veg + ginger; add oats + water; cook till creamy.

name: Oats Porridge (Sweet, Milk)
instructions: Cook oats in milk; add cinnamon + chopped banana or dates.

name: Daliya Khichdi
instructions: Roast daliya; pressure cook with moong dal + veg + water + turmeric.

name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
instructions: Saute spices + onion + tomato + mixed veg; simmer; finish with coriander.

name: Palak Paneer
instructions: Blanch spinach; puree; simmer with onion-tomato base; add cubed paneer.

name: Methi Aloo
instructions: Saute cumin + onion; add potato + methi leaves; cook till tender.

name: Bhindi Sabzi
instructions: Stir-fry bhindi with onion + spices till dry and crisp.

name: Lauki Sabzi
instructions: Saute cumin + chopped lauki; simmer covered till tender; finish coriander.

name: Karela Stir Fry
instructions: Slice karela; salt-rest; stir-fry with onion + spices till crisp.

name: Baingan Bharta
instructions: Roast brinjal; mash; saute onion-tomato; combine.

name: Aloo Gobi
instructions: Stir-fry cumin + potato + cauliflower with turmeric; cook covered till tender.

name: Tofu Bhurji
instructions: Crumble tofu; stir-fry with onion-tomato + turmeric + spices.

name: Paneer Bhurji
instructions: Crumble paneer; stir-fry with onion-tomato + spices.

name: Boiled Egg
instructions: Boil eggs for 8 minutes; cool; peel.

name: Egg Bhurji
instructions: Scramble eggs with onion-tomato + spices.

name: Egg Omelette (Plain)
instructions: Whisk eggs + salt + pepper; pour on hot pan; fold.

name: Egg White Omelette
instructions: Whisk only whites of 3 eggs with onion-tomato; cook on non-stick pan.

name: Egg Curry
instructions: Saute onion-tomato-spices; add halved boiled eggs; simmer briefly.

name: Grilled Chicken Breast
instructions: Marinate chicken breast with curd + spices; grill 6-8 min each side.

name: Chicken Curry (Home Style)
instructions: Marinate chicken with curd-ginger-garlic; saute spices + onion; add chicken + tomato; simmer.

name: Fish Curry (Coastal)
instructions: Grind coconut + spices; simmer fish in coconut-tamarind gravy.

name: Grilled Fish
instructions: Marinate fish with lemon + ginger-garlic + spices; grill 4 min each side.

name: Salmon Pan-Seared
instructions: Season salmon; sear skin-down 4 min, flip 3 min.

name: Coconut Chutney
instructions: Grind grated coconut + roasted dalia + green chilli + salt; temper mustard.

name: Mint Chutney
instructions: Grind mint + coriander + ginger + green chilli + lemon + salt.

name: Tomato Chutney
instructions: Saute tomato + onion + spices; grind smooth; temper mustard.

name: Vegetable Raita
instructions: Whisk curd; fold in chopped cucumber + tomato + onion + cumin powder + salt.

name: Boondi Raita
instructions: Soak boondi in water; squeeze; mix with whisked curd + spices.

name: Mixed Fruit Salad
instructions: Chop seasonal fruits; squeeze lemon; finish with mint.

name: Soaked Almonds
instructions: Soak 5-7 almonds overnight; peel; chew on empty stomach.

name: Methi Water
instructions: Soak 1 tsp methi seeds overnight; drink water + chew seeds in morning.

name: Warm Lemon Water
instructions: Squeeze ½ lemon in 250 ml warm water; drink fresh.

name: Buttermilk Spiced
instructions: Whisk curd + water; mix in ginger, curry leaves, salt, cumin powder.

name: Green Tea
instructions: Steep green tea bag/leaves in 80°C water 3 min.

name: Masala Chai (Reduced Sugar)
instructions: Boil water + ginger + cardamom; add tea leaves + toned milk + ½ tsp sugar.

name: Tender Coconut Water
instructions: Open tender coconut; drink fresh water.

name: Roasted Chana (Bhuna)
instructions: Take 30 g pre-roasted chana; portion in small bowl.

name: Khakra (Multigrain)
instructions: Eat 1 multigrain khakra; pair with chutney.

name: Mixed Nuts (Daily)
instructions: Portion 5 almonds + 3 walnut halves + 1 tsp pumpkin seeds.

name: Apple Slices (Daily)
instructions: Slice 1 medium apple; eat with skin.

name: Hot Turmeric Milk
instructions: Boil 150 ml toned milk; add ¼ tsp turmeric + pinch black pepper.

name: Warm Milk With Almond
instructions: Heat 150 ml toned milk; stir in 1 tsp almond powder.

name: Drumstick Soup
instructions: Boil drumstick + garlic + pepper; strain; season with lemon.

name: Vegetable Clear Soup
instructions: Boil mixed veg + garlic + pepper; season with salt-lemon.

name: Tomato Soup
instructions: Simmer tomato + carrot + garlic; blend; reheat with pepper.

name: Sauteed Greens
instructions: Saute garlic + chopped greens; finish with lemon.

name: Beetroot Salad
instructions: Grate raw beetroot; toss with carrot, lemon, salt, cumin powder.

name: Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook quinoa 1:2 water; cool; toss with chopped veg + olive oil + lemon.

name: Vegetable Sandwich (Multigrain)
instructions: Layer cucumber, tomato, lettuce, mint chutney between 2 multigrain bread slices.

name: Stuffed Tofu Wrap
instructions: Cook spiced tofu bhurji; roll inside multigrain roti with onion-mint chutney.

name: Daal Khichdi (Soft, Convalescent)
instructions: Pressure cook rice + moong dal soft (4 whistles), no spices; ghee + cumin temper.
